title: KyoteKy's Really Cool Modpack
description: Modpack that restricts you to a 16x16 overworld chunk area!
body:
# KyoteKy's Really Cool Modpack

This is a somewhat small modpack, that aims to make a world of 16x16 chunks fully playable, from spawn to killing the ender dragon!

## Features

- Craft many more tools and weapons, with mods such as Tinkers' Construct!
- Upgrade your (small) world with many more decoration blocks!
- Kill the Wither to obtain materials for Netherite!
- Kill the Ender Dragon to get Elytra

## Coming Soon

- Modified mob spawns and structures so any seed is playable
- and more(probably)

This is my first modpack, and I'm learning a lot. Expect good things in the future!
